description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical shampoo bottle with a prominent, wide, polygonal base that appears to provide stability. The bottle features a dark, glossy exterior with a label that displays the 'ADOBE energy' branding in bold white and red text, along with a stylized infinity logo. The base is black and octagonal, adorned with four evenly spaced yellow circular accents, possibly decorative or functional as anti-slip pads. The label wraps around the bottle and includes additional text in Portuguese, as well as small colored icons representing various Adobe software products. The bottle's cap is not clearly visible, but the top is flush with the cylinder, suggesting a simple closure. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, likely intended to stand out on a shelf or in an urban setting.
description: A tall, cylindrical shampoo bottle with a wide, polygonal black base and a glossy, branded label featuring the 'ADOBE energy' logo and colorful icons. The design is modern and stable, with yellow accents on the base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'ADOBE energy' logo, infinity symbol, and most of the label text clearly on the cylindrical bottle.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view with partial visibility of the logo and label, emphasizing the black base and yellow accents.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying colored Adobe software icons and less label text, with the polygonal base and yellow dots visible.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the red vertical stripe on the label and the transition between the front and back label graphics.
attribute_label_text: ADOBE energy versão compacta Consumimos a sua mente, transformamos a energia que você precisa
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall and cylindrical with a wide, polygonal base
attribute_packaging_graphics: stylized infinity symbol, colored Adobe software icons, abstract background pattern
